results.content:
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('/app/solution.txt')
data=p.read_text()
print('exists', p.exists())
print('lines', len(data.splitlines()))
print('endswith_newline', data.endswith('\n'))
print('tail_repr', repr(data[-20:]))
PY
exists True
lines 280
endswith_newline True
tail_repr 'ut all\ncase\ne\ne\nn\nw\n'
